title: Girl, You My Friend!
description: Elektra navigates life and friendship with buds Flirtacia, Zelda the Ostrich, and Charlie the Robot. You’ll love how there’s a character for each of you to relate to.
altHero: Elektra in a park carrying shopping bags
alt1: Elektra zapping a restaurant bill while Charlie’s brain overheats
alt2: Flirtacia sitting in a bit tub of popcorn
alt3: Flirtacia handing Elektra her phone with avatar of a guy named Ted
